category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a cross-platform Rust rewrite of GNU findutils.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is uutils-findutils and current_curation.display-name matches it.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official uutils findutils documentation/homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
